title: digitaria radicosa var. hirsuta
intro: Digitaria radicosa var. hirsuta, also known as Hairy Panicgrass or Hairy Fingergrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Digitaria radicosa var. hirsuta include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
